content:
I need to analyze the class diagram to find entities with no incoming dependency relations (nothing points TO them).

Let me collect all targets of dependency arrows (`-->`, `*--`, `<|--`, `<|..`) to find entities that ARE depended upon, then find those that never appear as targets.

Looking through all the relations, I need to find entities that never appear on the right-hand side of any relationship.

Let me systematically go through the relations and collect all targets, then find entities that are never targets.

After carefully analyzing all relationships in the diagrams, the entities that appear only as sources (left side) and never as targets (right side) of any relation include:

- `TestAnalyzer` - appears as source, never as target
- `MermaidAutoRepair` - source only
- `CommentGenerator` - source only  
- `MermaidDiagramGenerator` - source only
- `MermaidValidationPipeline` - source only
- `ArchJSONAggregator` - source only
- `MetricsCalculator` - source only
- `CacheManager` - source only
- `ConfigLoader` - source only
- `ErrorHandler` - source only
- `ProgressReporter` - source only
- `StderrReporter` - source only
- `NoopReporter` - source only
- `DiagramIndexGenerator` - source only
- `FileDiscoveryService` - source only
- `OutputPathResolver` - source only
- `TestOutputWriter` - source only
- `PluginRegistry` - source only
- `CppPlugin` - source only
- `GoPlugin` - source only
- `JavaPlugin` - source only
- `PythonPlugin` - source only
- `TypeScriptPlugin` - source only
- `BehaviorAnalyzer` - source only
- `FrameworkDetector` - source only
- `GoModResolver` - source only
- `AtlasRenderer` - source only
- `MermaidTemplates` - source only
- `MavenCrossModuleParser` - source only
- `PythonImportExtractor` - source only
- `TypeScriptAnalyzer` - source only

After careful counting:

{"answer": 31}
